scripts.db:migrate:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prisma:schema && prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:generate:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prisma:schema && prisma generate
scripts.db:studio:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prisma:schema && prisma studio
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prisma:schema && prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:generate:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prisma:schema && prisma generate
scripts.db:studio:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prisma:schema && prisma studio
